description: Composition White T-shirt for men made of 50% polyester, 25% cotton and 25% rayon, has a round ribbed neckline, short sleeves and graphic print on the front Fit Slim fit Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Get casual with the utmost comfort in this nike T-shirt. The blended fabric engineered with Dri-Fit technology, wicks sweat away and keeps you fresh and comfortable during fun times with friends, while the fashionable graphic print adds style. Pair this tee with your favourite denims and sports shoes.
